nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview documentation for the Vietnamese Driving License Exam Practice App, covering team information, technology stack (Java, SQLite, Firebase), app features, and UI screenshots for all major screens including the dashboard, traffic signs, exam simulation, and topic-based review.

nodes.name: build.gradle
nodes.summary: Top-level Gradle build script that declares the Google Services plugin (for Firebase integration) and the Android application and library plugin versions (8.4.0) as project-wide buildscript dependencies without applying them directly.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the legacy `buildscript` block for Google Services classpath alongside the modern `plugins` block with `apply false`, which is the standard pattern for top-level Android project build files.

nodes.name: gradle.properties
nodes.summary: Project-wide Gradle properties file configuring the JVM daemon with 2 GB heap and UTF-8 encoding, enabling AndroidX, and disabling transitive R class generation to reduce APK size.

nodes.name: gradlew.bat
nodes.summary: Auto-generated Gradle Wrapper launcher script for Windows that locates a valid Java installation, sets the classpath to `gradle-wrapper.jar`, and invokes `GradleWrapperMain` to bootstrap the correct Gradle version without requiring a pre-installed Gradle distribution.
nodes.languageNotes: Standard Apache-licensed Gradle Wrapper batch script; all label targets (:findJavaFromJavaHome, :execute, :fail, :mainEnd, :omega) are boilerplate and below the significance threshold for individual sub-file nodes.

nodes.name: settings.gradle
nodes.summary: Gradle settings file that defines the root project name, enforces strict dependency resolution (failing on per-project repository declarations), configures Google Maven and Maven Central repositories, and includes the single `:app` submodule.
